evals.name: confirmed-requirements-to-implementation
evals.prompt: i've reviewed the requirements doc, go ahead and build the payment processing module. it needs to handle charges, refunds, and webhook validation. the spec is confirmed.
evals.expected_output: Skill loads the confirmed requirement, spawns plan-agent for phased technical plan, dispatches workers for independent phases in parallel when possible, runs reviewer until PASS, runs e2e-runner for tests + verification, and conditionally commits if gates pass.

evals.name: multi-phase-feature-from-bdd
evals.prompt: ok the BDD doc in docs/feature/login.md is confirmed. start implementing the login feature with rate limiting and email verification.
evals.expected_output: Skill loads BDD document from docs/feature/, extracts scenarios and expected results, spawns plan-agent mapped to BDD scenarios, dispatches workers (parallel for rate-limit and email modules if independent), reviewer audits against BDD expected results, e2e-runner verifies scenarios pass.

evals.name: missing-requirements-should-stop
evals.prompt: just start coding something cool, i don't have any requirements doc yet
evals.expected_output: Skill stops at Step 1. No BDD document or confirmed requirement found. Tells user to confirm requirements first (or run bdd-product-craft).
